Percutaneous Microwave Ablation of Complex Cystic Renal Masses: Assessment of Technique, Safety, and Clinical Outcomes.
abstract: PURPOSE: To evaluate the technique, safety, and clinical outcomes of computed tomography (CT)-guided microwave ablation of cystic renal masses. MATERIAL AND METHODS: An institutional database was used to identify consecutive patients with cystic renal masses that were treated with percutaneous microwave ablation. Preablation CT or magnetic resonance (MR) images were reviewed by 2 board-certified, fellowship-trained abdominal radiologists to classify cystic renal masses as complex or Bosniak III/IV masses. A third board-certified, fellowship-trained radiologist served as the tiebreaker for cases of discordance between the 2 readers. Tumor factors such as size and renal nephrometry score were recorded. Ablation technique, including management of the cystic component of the tumors, adjunctive maneuvers, and power and time for the ablations, were recorded. Technical success, primary and secondary effectiveness, adverse events, and clinical outcomes were assessed. RESULTS: Fifty-six patients with 61 cystic renal masses underwent CT-guided microwave ablation. The diagnostic yield of biopsy of cystic renal masses was 87%. Fifty of the 61 cystic renal masses (82%) were renal cell carcinoma. Primary technical success rate was 95.1%. There was no significant change in serum creatinine or estimated glomerular filtration rate before and after ablation. There were 4 (8%) Society of Interventional Radiology (SIR) Grade 1 adverse events, all of which were small perinephric hematomas. CONCLUSIONS: CT-guided microwave ablation of cystic renal masses, including cystic renal cell carcinoma, is technically feasible, highly effective, and associated with a low adverse event rate.

summary.title_ko: 복잡한 실질성 요로 종양에 대한 경피적 마이크로웨이브 절제술: 기법, 안전성 및 임상 결과 평가
summary.one_line: CT 유도 경피적 마이크로웨이브 절제술은 복잡한 실질성 요로 종양을 포함한 캐스틱 요로 종양에 대해 기술적으로 가능하고 높은 효과를 보이며 부작용 발생률이 낮다.
summary.subjects: 56명의 환자 (61개의 복잡한 캐스틱 요로 종양)
summary.intervention: CT 유도 경피적 마이크로웨이브 절제술
summary.results: 주요 결과: 기술 성공률은 95.1%였으며, 부작용 발생률은 Society of Interventional Radiology (SIR) Grade 1 등급의 부작용으로 8%였다. 이 부작용들은 모두 작은 페리네프릭 혈종이었다.
summary.implication: CT 유도 경피적 마이크로웨이브 절제술은 복잡한 캐스틱 요로 종양을 포함하여 안전하고 효과적인 치료 옵션이 될 수 있다.

title: Impact of Iliac Vein Compression on the Outcome of Pelvic Venous Embolization in Patients with Pelvic Venous Disorder.
abstract: PURPOSE: To compare chronic pelvic pain outcomes after pelvic venous embolization in patients with pelvic venous disorders with and those without iliac vein compression. MATERIALS AND METHODS: Patients with pelvic venous disorders who underwent pelvic venous embolization at a single center were retrospectively reviewed. The patients were categorized into iliac vein compression group and non-iliac vein compression group. Chronic pelvic pain control and chronic pelvic pain-free survival were compared between these 2 groups. Risk factors for noncontrol chronic pelvic pain were analyzed via logistic regression. Deep vein thrombosis (DVT) of the lower limb was examined in the iliac vein compression group after the intervention. RESULTS: Among 102 collected patients, iliac vein compression was identified in 51 patients (50.0%). The iliac vein compression group was younger (35.7 years [SD ± 6.7] vs 43.6 years [SD ± 12.1]; P < .001) and had more lower limb involvement (18 of 51 [35.3%] vs 6 of 51 [11.8%]; P = .009). Chronic pelvic pain control rates (noniliac vein compression group, 40 of 51 [78.4%]; iliac vein compression group, 42 of 51 [82.4%]; P = 1.00) and chronic pelvic pain-free survival rates (P = .941) did not differ significantly between groups. Preinterventional visual analog scale score (adjusted odds ratio [OR], 0.37; 95% CI, 0.21-0.67; P < .001) and lower limb involvement (adjusted OR, 7.49; 95% CI, 2.10-26.68; P = .002) were independent predictors for noncontrol chronic pelvic pain. No DVT of the lower limb was found at the 1-month follow-up in 47 patients with iliac vein compression. CONCLUSIONS: In patients with pelvic venous disorders and concomitant iliac vein compression but without severe lower limb venous disorder, primary venous embolization alone, without iliac vein stent placement, appears to be safe and effective.

summary.title_ko: 골반정맥압박이 골반정맥질환 환자에서 골반정맥색전술 후 만성골반통 해소에 미치는 영향
summary.one_line: 골반정맥질환이 있는 환자에서 골반정맥압박 유무와 무관하게 골반정맥색전술의 만성골반통 해소 효과가 비슷하다.
summary.subjects: 102명의 골반정맥질환 환자 (골반정맥압박 그룹: 51명, 비골반정맥압박 그룹: 51명)
summary.intervention: 골반정맥색전술(Pelvic Venous Embolization)
summary.results: 골반정맥압박이 있는 환자와 없는 환자의 만성골반통 해소율(비골반정맥압박 그룹: 78.4%, 골반정맥압박 그룹: 82.4%)과 무통 생존률은 유의미한 차이가 없었다 (P = .941). 만성골반통 해소에 실패한 독립적인 위험 요인으로는 사전 시술 전 비시각적 척도(VAS) 점수와 하지 정맥질환의 존재 여부가 확인되었다. 골반정맥압박이 있는 환자 47명에서 1개월 후 추적 관찰 결과, 하지 심부정맥혈전증(DVT)은 발견되지 않았다.
summary.implication: 골반정맥질환과 골반정맥압박을 동반한 환자 중 심각한 하지 정맥질환이 없는 경우, 골반정맥색전술만으로도 안전하고 효과적일 수 있다.

title: Safety and Effectiveness of Radiation Lobectomy for Primary Liver Cancers Using Resin Microspheres.
abstract: PURPOSE: To evaluate safety, hypertrophy, and kinetic growth rate (KGR) of future liver remnant following yttrium-90 radiation lobectomy (RL-90Y) in liver cancer using resin microspheres. MATERIALS AND METHODS: This was a retrospective, single-center study. Patients with primary liver cancer who underwent RL-90Y transarterial radioembolization (TARE) from November 2015 to December 2022 were reviewed. Twenty-eight patients (68% with HCC and 36% with iCCA) were included. The right lobe was treated in 18 of 28 patients (64%). Single-compartment dosimetry model was used. Total liver parenchymal volume (TLPV), treated parenchymal volume, and future liver remnant volume (FLRV) were recorded at baseline and after treatment at 0-4 months (T1) and >4 months (T2). Hypertrophy, FLRV/TLPV ratio, and KGR were calculated. Treatment response was categorized by modified Response Evaluation Criteria in Solid Tumors (RECIST) for hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC) and RECIST for intrahepatic cholangiocarcinoma (iCCA). Primary outcomes included safety profile, hypertrophy, and KGR. Secondary outcomes included disease response and proportion of patients bridged to surgery. RESULTS: The hypertrophy and KGR at T1 were 16% (interquartile range [IQR], 4%-28%) and 1.5% per week (IQR, 0.6%-2.3%) with increase in FLRV (P < .001) and FLRV/TLPV ratio (P < .001). KGR was higher at T1 than at T2 (1.3% vs 0.6%, P = .034). Treatment response (n = 27) was complete, partial, stable, and progressive in 53%, 24%, 6%, and 18% for HCC and 0%, 20%, 50%, and 30% for iCCA. Seven patients (25%) were bridged to resection at 2.5 months (IQR, 1.9-4.7 months). No differences were noted in atrophy, hypertrophy, and KGR at both time points (T1 and T2) when stratified on type of cancer, cirrhosis, portal vein thrombosis, or prescribed tumor dose. CONCLUSIONS: RL-90Y TARE using single-compartment dosimetry with resin microspheres can safely be performed in patients with primary liver cancer with KGR of 1.5% per week.

summary.title_ko: 리升级改造后的回答如下：对于树脂微球进行90Y放射性叶切除术（RL-90Y）治疗原发性肝癌的安全性和有效性
summary.one_line: 90Y放射性叶切除术使用树脂微球对原发性肝癌患者是安全的，并且可以促进未来肝脏残余体积的生长和增生，同时控制肿瘤的发展。
summary.subjects: 28명의 원발성 간암 환자 (68% 간세포 carcinoma, 36% intrahepatic cholangiocarcinoma)
summary.intervention: yttrium-90 방사선 절제술(Transarterial radioembolization with resin microspheres)

results.treatment_response_HCC: HCC: complete response 53%, partial response 24%, stable disease 6%, progressive disease 18%
results.treatment_response_iCCA: iCCA: complete response 0%, partial response 20%, stable disease 50%, progressive disease 30%

summary.implication: 90Y 방사선 절제술은 원발성 간암 환자에서 안전하게 수행될 수 있으며, 평균 한 주에 1.5%의 성장률을 보이는 것으로 나타났다.

detailed_results.hypertrophy_and_KGR: FLRV와 FLRV/TLPV 비율은 시간 경과에 따라 증가하였으며 (P < .001), KGR은 T1에서 T2로 감소하였다 (T1: 1.3% vs T2: 0.6%, P = .034).
detailed_results.treatment_response: HCC 환자에서는 완전 반응이 53%, 부분 반응이 24%를 차지하였으며, iCCA 환자에서는 완전 반응이 없었으나 안정 상태가 50%로 가장 높았다.
detailed_results.bridged_to_surgery: 7명의 환자가 수술을 위한 다리 역할을 수행하여 평균 2.5개월 후 수술을 받았으며 (IQR, 1.9-4.7 months).

critique.limitations: 연구는 단일기관에서 이루어진 후향적 연구로 인해 일반화가 어렵다.
critique.comparison_with_previous_studies: 기존 연구와 비교하여, 이 연구에서는 세부적인 병리학적 상태에 따른 차이를 분석하지 않았다.

summary.clinical_application: 90Y 방사선 절제술은 간암 환자에서 안전하고 효과적인 치료법으로 사용될 수 있으며, 특히 수술을 위한 다리 역할로도 활용 가능하다.

title: Combination, Single-Session Transarterial Embolization with Ethiodized Oil Staining and Percutaneous Microwave Ablation for Central Renal Cell Carcinoma: A Pilot Study.
abstract: This study assessed outcomes of a single-session treatment combining transarterial embolization (TAE) with ethiodized oil staining and computed tomography (CT)-guided microwave ablation (MWA) for 7 patients with central renal cell carcinoma (RCC) (mean modified RENAL score, 10.7 [SD ± 0.8]). Three patients had metastatic RCC and demonstrated local tumor control over a mean follow-up of 18.3 months (SD ± 11.2) before dying. Four patients had Stage I RCC and received curative-intent treatment with durable responses for 29.8 months (SD ± 8.7). The mean estimated glomerular filtration rate declined 6 months after treatment. Although this was not statistically significant (P = .13), the study was not powered to detect small or moderate changes in renal function. One patient developed a Grade III adverse event requiring nephrostomy. Overall, TAE-MWA appeared technically feasible for treating central RCC, demonstrating a manageable safety profile in a high-risk cohort with limited therapeutic alternatives. However, caution should be exercised when treating tumors with high nephrometry scores.

summary.title_ko: 중앙부 신세포 carcinoma 치료를 위한 경동맥색전술과 CT 유도 미파이브레이션 절단 병행 단일 세션 치료법: 탐색 연구
summary.one_line: 중앙부 신세포 carcinoma 환자에게 TAE와 MWA를 동시에 적용한 단일 세션 치료법의 효과 및 안전성을 평가하였다.
summary.subjects: 중央部肾细胞癌患者 / N=7
summary.intervention: 经动脉栓塞术(TAE)与碘化油染色结合CT引导下的微波消融(MWA)
summary.results: 3名转移性肾细胞癌患者的局部肿瘤控制时间为18.3个月(SD ± 11.2)，4名I期患者接受根治性治疗后的持续反应时间为29.8个月(SD ± 8.7)。估计的肾小球滤过率在治疗后6个月下降，但无统计学意义(P = .13)。
summary.implication: 对于高风险且治疗选择有限的中央部肾细胞癌患者，TAE-MWA技术上可行，并显示出可管理的安全性。
summary.detailed_results: 7名患者的平均改良RENAL评分为10.7(SD ± 0.8)，其中3名为转移性RCC，4名为I期RCC。治疗后6个月的估计肾小球滤过率下降，但无统计学意义(P = .13)。一名患者出现III级不良事件，需要进行经皮肾造瘘术。
summary.critique: 该研究样本量较小且未充分评估肾功能变化；对于高分Nephrometry评分肿瘤的治疗需谨慎。
summary.clinical_application: TAE-MWA联合疗法为中央部肾细胞癌患者提供了一种新的治疗选择，特别是在那些传统治疗方法有限的情况下。

title: Percutaneous Gastrostomy as a Salvage Technique for Gastric Perforation After Radiofrequency Ablation.
Endovascular Treatment Modalities for Infrapopliteal Artery Disease: A Bayesian Network Meta-Analysis with Exploratory Evaluation of Retrievable Scaffold Therapy.
abstract: BACKGROUND: Endovascular options for infrapopliteal artery disease include plain balloon angioplasty (PTA), drug‑coated balloons (DCB), drug‑eluting and bare‑metal stents (DES), and atherectomy. Retrievable scaffold therapy (RST) has recently emerged as a temporary scaffolding strategy used with DCB, but its comparative effectiveness remains uncertain. METHODS: A comprehensive literature search identified 21 randomized and 4 single‑arm trials (n = 3184). Eligible studies reported at least one prespecified outcome: 30‑day major adverse events (MAE), 12‑month all‑cause mortality, 6‑month clinically driven target lesion revascularization (CD‑TLR), or 6‑month major amputation. Random‑effects models generated odds ratios (ORs) with 95% credible intervals (CrIs). SUCRA values summarized treatment rankings. RESULTS: Atherectomy ranked best for 30‑day MAE (SUCRA 77.2%), though no treatment yielded a statistically significant reduction in the Odds Ratio. It was also associated with a significantly reduced 12‑month mortality versus PTA (OR 0.39, 95% CrI 0.15-0.90; SUCRA 97.8%). For 6‑month CD‑TLR, atherectomy (OR 0.26, 95% CrI 0.00-0.62), DCB (OR 0.42, 95% CrI 0.30-0.58), and DES (OR 0.43, 95% CrI 0.19-0.88) showed significant benefit. No treatment significantly reduced major amputation. RST showed favorable but nonsignificant reductions, indicating a smaller number of available studies, consistently ranking mid‑tier across all outcomes. Meta‑regression identified CKD and longer lesion length as predictors of higher CD‑TLR risk. CONCLUSIONS: Atherectomy showed the most consistent benefits across mortality and reintervention outcomes, while RST demonstrated promising but inconclusive performance. Larger randomized trials are needed to clarify RST's role in infrapopliteal revascularization.

summary.title_ko: 하부 대퇴동맥 질환을 위한 내피내 치료 방법: DCB와 함께 사용되는 가용성 스크래프 요법을 고려한 베이지안 네트워크 메타분석
summary.one_line: 가용성 스크래프 요법(RST)과 다른 내피내 치료 방법의 비교 효과를 분석하여, 아테롬ectomy가 재관련 수술 및 사망률 감소에 가장 효과적임을 확인했습니다.
summary.subjects: 21개 무작위 배정 연구와 4개 단일 군 연구 (n=3,184)

intervention.DES: 약물 방출 스텐트 및 비방출 금속 스텐트

results.30일 중대 부작용(MAE): 아테롬ectomy가 가장 낮은 발생률을 보였으나, 통계적으로 유의미한 차이는 없음 (SUCRA 77.2%)

results.1년 사망률: 아테롬ectomy가 PTA 대비 통계적으로 유의미하게 감소함 (OR 0.39, 95% CrI 0.15-0.90; SUCRA 97.8%)

results.6개월 임상적 재관련 수술(CD-TLR): 아테롬ectomy, DCB 및 DES가 통계적으로 유의미한 효과를 보임 (OR 각각 0.26, 0.42, 0.43)

results.RST: 통계적으로 유의미하지 않은 감소를 보였으나, 모든 결과에서 중간 등급을 차지함

summary.implication: 아테롬ectomy가 사망률과 재관련 수술에 가장 효과적임이 확인되었으며, RST는 잠재적인 가능성을 보여주지만 추가 대규모 무작위 배정 연구가 필요하다.

title: Uterine Artery Embolisation (UAE) in Women Under 40 Years is Effective: Time to Leave Behind the Old Narrative.
Multi-center Randomized Controlled Trial of Catheter-Directed Mechanical Thrombectomy Versus Systemic Thrombolysis in Patients with Acute Intermediate-to-High-Risk Pulmonary Embolism: Study Protocol.
abstract: PURPOSE: This study aims to compare the efficacy and safety of catheter-directed mechanical thrombectomy using the Tendvia system versus systemic thrombolysis in patients with intermediate-to-high-risk acute pulmonary embolism. MATERIALS AND METHODS: This is a 1:1 block-randomized, controlled, open-label parallel-group, multi-center, superiority trial. Eligible patients aged 18-75 years, diagnosed with intermediate-to-high-risk acute pulmonary embolism and hemodynamic deterioration, will be included. The main exclusion criteria are unsuitable target vessel criteria; sustained systolic hypotension; severe pulmonary hypertension; hematocrit < 28%; chronic pulmonary hypertension; left bundle branch block; chronic left heart failure; renal dysfunction; coagulopathy; recent cardiothoracic surgery; intracardiac thrombus. The intervention group will undergo catheter-directed thrombectomy using the Tendvia system under fluoroscopic guidance within 4 h of computed tomography pulmonary angiography. The control group will receive standard alteplase infusion. The primary efficacy endpoint is absolute reduction in the right ventricular/left ventricular diameter ratio from baseline to 48 h post-intervention, measured by blinded core-lab computed tomography pulmonary angiography analysis. The primary safety endpoint is the rate of composite major adverse events within 48 h. Secondary endpoints include the proportion of patients achieving a ≥ 50% reduction from baseline in NT-proBNP level at 48 h post-intervention, dyspnea scores, change in pulmonary arterial pressure, 48-h post-procedure clinical deterioration, symptomatic recurrence within 30 days, major access site complications, device-related serious adverse events, length of post-procedure hospital and intensive care unit stay, and change in cardiac biomarkers. EXPECTED GAIN OF KNOWLEDGE: This trial will provide evidence regarding the use of catheter-directed thrombectomy in intermediate-to-high-risk pulmonary embolism. TRIAL REGISTRATION: This study was registered in Clinicaltrials.gov on 2025-06-22 (Registration number NCT07032025).

summary.title_ko: 중간-고위험 급성 폐색塞栓症患者的导管导向机械血栓切除术与全身溶栓治疗的多中心随机对照试验：研究方案
summary.one_line: 중간-고위험 급성 폐색塞栓症患者的导管导向机械血栓切除术（使用Tendvia系统）与全身溶栓治疗的有效性和安全性比较的多中心随机对照试验。
summary.design: 1:1 블록 무작위 배정, 통제된 개방형 병렬군 연구, 다기관 우월성 시험

summary.results: 主要有效性终点：基线至48小时后右心室/左心室直径比的绝对减少量，通过盲法核心实验室CT肺动脉造影分析得出。主要安全性终点：48小时内复合重大不良事件的发生率。

title: Correction to: CIRSE Standards of Practice on Analgesia and Sedation for Interventional Radiology in Adults.
Effectiveness and Safety of Bleomycin Electrosclerotherapy for Slow-Flow Vascular Malformations: A Systematic Review.
abstract: PURPOSE: To review the available evidence on the effectiveness and safety of bleomycin electrosclerotherapy (BEST) for slow-flow vascular malformations. MATERIALS AND METHODS: A systematic review was conducted according to PRISMA guidelines, with a protocol registered in PROSPERO. Five databases were searched, supplemented by citation tracking, to identify peer-reviewed studies reporting clinical outcomes of BEST for slow-flow vascular malformations. Single-patient case reports were excluded. Two authors independently extracted data and assessed risk of bias. RESULTS: Ten studies were included, with a total of 401 patients and 416 lesions. Seven studies were retrospective, three were prospective, and one was comparative. Any symptom improvement was reported in 62-100% of patients; however, outcome definitions and assessment methods varied substantially across studies, limiting direct comparability. Any size reduction was reported in 83-100% of lesions, based on clinical and imaging-based assessments, including volumetry. Serious adverse events were uncommon, and no systemic toxicity was reported. All non-randomised studies had serious risk of bias. CONCLUSION: BEST appears promising for selected slow-flow vascular malformations. However, evidence is limited by methodological heterogeneity and high risk of bias, and treatment decisions should remain individualised and based on multidisciplinary evaluation.

summary.title_ko: 블레오마이신 전기경화술(BEST)을 이용한 느린 흐름 혈관 이상의 효과와 안전성: 체계적 문헌 검토
summary.one_line: 블레오마이신 전기경화술(BEST)은 느린 흐름 혈관 이상 치료에 대해 잠재적으로 유망하지만, 연구 설계의 다양性和高偏倚风险限制了其结论的普遍性。
summary.subjects: 401명의 환자 (총 416개 병변)
summary.intervention: 블레오마이신 전기경화술(BEST)
summary.results: 환자의 증상 개선율은 62-100%로 보고되었으며, 병변 크기는 83-100%에서 감소되었다. 중대한 부작용은 드물었고 전신 독성은 보고되지 않았다.
summary.implication: BEST는 선택된 느린 흐름 혈관 이상 치료에 대해 잠재적으로 유망하지만, 연구 설계의 다양성과 높은 편향 위험으로 인해 증거가 제한적이다. 따라서 치료 결정은 다학제 평가를 기반으로 개인화되어야 한다.

title: From Variability to Accountability: Rethinking Radiation Exposure in Pediatric Osteoid Osteoma Ablation.

In Vivo Validation of Computational Fluid Dynamics for Determining the Pressure Gradient for Multi-segmental Femoropopliteal Disease.
abstract: PURPOSE: In peripheral arterial disease, the presence of multi-segmental (adjacent) stenotic lesions is common. The application of anatomic grading and duplex ultrasound for defining the significance of multi-segmental lesions is limited. This study aimed to validate computational fluid dynamics (CFD) simulations for estimating the pressure gradient in patients with multi-segmental femoropopliteal disease. MATERIALS AND METHODS: Fifteen patients scheduled for angiography with multiple lesions in the femoropopliteal artery were prospectively enrolled. Pressures were recorded in rest and after papaverine administration using sheath and pressure-wire measurements. The resting pressure gradient of the full segment and the fractional flow reserve (FFR) of the full segment and individual lesions were calculated. These metrics were noninvasively replicated by CTA-based CFD using a reference flow rate (CFDm) and a duplex ultrasound-derived flow rate (CFDi). The agreement and diagnostic accuracy of CFD for identifying hemodynamic significance was assessed. RESULTS: CFDm underestimated the pressure gradient by - 4.0 ± 6.2 mmHg (mean ± SD). CFDi closely approximated the measured gradient with a 0.1 ± 3.1 mmHg difference. The full-segment FFR had a - 0.02 ± 0.06 difference and the individual-lesion FFR had a 0.01 ± 0.06 difference relative to the measured FFR. The diagnostic accuracy of CFD for the resting pressure gradient was 73% (CFDi) and 80% (CFDm). CFD demonstrated a diagnostic accuracy of 89% for full-vessel FFR and 83% for individual-lesion FFR. CONCLUSION: The results provide proof-of-concept validation for the use of CFD for noninvasive assessment of multi-segmental femoropopliteal disease. This could guide the treatment plan of multi-segmental PAD. LEVEL OF EVIDENCE: Level 3b, Individual case-control study.

summary.title_ko: 다중 부위 협착성 병변을 가진 주정맥동맥 질환 환자에서 계산 유체역학(CFD)을 이용한 압력 차 검사의 유효성 평가
summary.one_line: CFD 기반 비침습적 방법이 다중 부위 협착성 병변을 가진 주정맥동맥 질환 환자의 압력 차와 흐름 예측에서 실제 측정값과 유사한 결과를 보여주며, 임상적 진단 정확도를 제공한다.
summary.subjects: 15명의 주정맥동맥 질환 환자 (다중 협착성 병변)
summary.intervention: 압력 측정 및 CFD 기반 비침습적 압력 차와 흐름 예측
summary.results: CFD 기반 비침습적 방법은 실제 압력 차를 -4.0 ± 6.2 mmHg로 추정하였으며, 이는 실제 측정값과 유사한 결과를 보여주었습니다 (CFDi: 0.1 ± 3.1 mmHg). 전체 부위의 흐름 예측 지수(FFR)와 개별 병변 FFR은 각각 -0.02 ± 0.06과 0.01 ± 0.06로 실제 측정값과 유사한 결과를 보여주었습니다. CFD의 진단 정확도는 압력 차에 대한 비침습적 방법이 73% (CFDi)와 80% (CFDm), 전체 부위 FFR은 89%, 개별 병변 FFR은 83%로 나타났습니다.
summary.implication: CFD 기반 비침습적 방법을 이용한 다중 부위 협착성 병변의 주정맥동맥 질환 환자의 압력 차와 흐름 예측이 임상적으로 유용하며, 이는 치료 계획 수립에 도움이 될 수 있습니다.

title: A Review on Artificial Intelligence as a Solution to Burnout in Interventional Radiology.
abstract: PURPOSE: We review burnout risk factors in interventional radiology (IR) and explore how artificial intelligence (AI) would address burnout from a workplace aspect. MATERIALS AND METHODS: We performed a literature search on PubMed on risk factors for burnout in interventional radiology and AI tools to address burnout challenges. RESULTS: IR specialists face burnout risk at personal, workplace and system levels. AI could identify burnout using demographic data and free text, alleviate administrative workload, and manage workflow. AI could also enhance procedural efficiency via automated navigation systems, reducing stress from radiation exposure. Future directions include enhanced burnout identification and medical coding for access to longitudinal data. CONCLUSION: AI may be a solution to addressing specific burnout risk factors in interventional radiology. LEVEL OF EVIDENCE: No level of evidence. Review Article.

summary.title_ko: 인공지능이 개입영상의학 전문가들의 직장 스트레스 해소에 미치는 영향에 대한 고찰
summary.one_line: 인공지능은 개인, 조직 및 시스템 수준에서 발생하는 개입영상의학 전문가들의 직업적 피로를 감소시키는데 도움이 될 수 있다.
summary.subjects: 개입영상의학 전문가들
summary.intervention: 인공지능을 활용한 직장 환경 개선 및 업무 효율성 향상
summary.results: AI는 개인, 조직 및 시스템 수준에서 발생하는 피로를 감소시키는데 도움이 될 수 있다. AI는 직원의 피로도를 인구통계학적 데이터와 자유형 텍스트를 통해 식별하고 행정 업무 부담을 완화하며, 작업 효율성을 높이는 워크플로 관리 도구를 제공한다.
summary.implication: AI는 개입영상의학 전문가들의 피로도 감소에 중요한 역할을 할 수 있으며, 이를 통해 장기적으로 직원 만족도와 업무 효율성을 향상시킬 수 있다. 그러나 이러한 기술 도입은 데이터 접근성과 보안 문제를 해결해야 하는 추가적인 고려사항이 필요하다.

title: Chemo First or Ablation First? The Sequencing Dilemma in Ablatable Colorectal Liver Metastases.
Transarterial Embolization for the Treatment of Symptomatic Hip Osteoarthritis.
abstract: PURPOSE: To evaluate the safety and clinical effectiveness of transarterial embolization (TAE) using temporary embolic agents in patients with symptomatic hip osteoarthritis (OA) refractory to conservative treatment. MATERIALS AND METHODS: This single-centre retrospective analysis included patients undergoing TAE between January 2023 and April 2025. Eligibility required ≥ 3 months of clinically and radiographically confirmed hip OA unresponsive to conservative therapy. Embolization was performed using rapidly resorbable gelatin microspheres or imipenem/cilastatin. Outcomes included technical success, adverse events, and patient-reported outcomes (numeric rating scale [NRS] pain; Hip Disability and Osteoarthritis Outcome Score [HOOS]) assessed at baseline and up to 12 months. Clinically meaningful improvement was defined using minimum clinically important difference (MCID) thresholds (≥ 2 points for NRS; ≥ 10 points for HOOS). RESULTS: Forty-one patients (median age 65 years) underwent TAE with a technical success rate of 97.5% (40/41). The lateral circumflex femoral artery was embolized in all cases, with additional internal iliac branches treated in 27.5% (11/40). No major or moderate adverse events occurred; minor transient skin discoloration was observed in 7.3% (all after imipenem/cilastatin). Median NRS decreased from 7 to 4 at 12 months (p < .001), with significant improvement across all HOOS domains. MCID was achieved in 64.3% for NRS and 85-92% for HOOS. Two patients (4.9%) underwent total hip replacement. CONCLUSION: TAE using temporary embolic agents was associated with sustained pain reduction and functional improvement at 12 months with a favourable safety profile.

summary.title_ko: 임상 치료에 반응하지 않는 증상성 대퇴관절 골관절염 환자에서 경동맥 색전술(TAE)의 안전성 및 임상 효과 평가
summary.one_line: 임상 치료에 반응하지 않는 증상성 대퇴관절 골관절염 환자를 대상으로 한 경동맥 색전술(TAE)이 안전하고 통증 완화와 기능 개선을 가져온다는 것을 확인하였다.
summary.subjects: 2023년 1월부터 2025년 4월까지 경동맥 색전술(TAE)을 받은 환자 41명 (중앙값 연령: 65세)
summary.intervention: 경동맥 색전술(TAE), 임시 색전제(신속히 흡수되는 젤라틴 미크로스피어 또는 이 mipenem/cilastatin 사용)
summary.results: 기술적 성공률은 97.5% (40/41)였으며, 중대한 부작용은 없었고 경미한 일시적인 피부 색소 침착이 7.3%에서 관찰되었다. 통증 등급(NRS)은 기저선 7에서 12개월 후 4로 감소(p < .001), 모든 HOOS 도메인에서 유의미한 개선을 보였다. NRS에서는 MCID를 달성한 환자가 64.3%, HOOS에서는 85-92%였으며, 두 명의 환자(4.9%)가 전신관절 교체술(Total Hip Replacement)을 받았다.
summary.implication: 임시 색전제를 사용한 경동맥 색전술(TAE)은 증상성 대퇴관절 골관절염에 대한 지속적인 통증 감소와 기능 개선을 가져오며, 안전성이 우수하다.

title: Commentary on "Outcomes of Transjugular Intrahepatic Portosystemic Shunt with Portal Vein Recanalization in Cirrhotic Patients with Acute Portal Vein Thrombosis: A Single-Center Study".
Repeated Genicular Artery Embolization Using Permanent Microspheres for Severe Osteoarthritis and Postsurgical Pain.
Endovascular Treatment of Infrapopliteal Arterial Disease in Patients with Diabetic Foot Ulcer: A Systematic Review of Randomised Controlled Trials.
abstract: BACKGROUND: Diabetes mellitus is strongly associated with peripheral arterial disease and foot ulceration, frequently requiring revascularisation to promote wound healing. Percutaneous transluminal angioplasty (PTA) is widely used for infrapopliteal arterial disease; however, its effectiveness for ulcer healing compared with alternative strategies remains uncertain. OBJECTIVE: To assess the effects of PTA in infrapopliteal arterial disease for diabetic ulcer healing. METHODS: We conducted a systematic review of randomised controlled trials identified through MEDLINE, Embase, LILACS, CENTRAL, CINAHL, ClinicalTrials.gov, the World Health Organisation International Clinical Trials Registry Platform, and grey literature sources. Study selection and data extraction were performed independently. Risk of bias was assessed using the Cochrane Risk of Bias tool. Meta-analyses were undertaken where appropriate, and certainty of evidence was evaluated. RESULTS: Of 34 542 records screened, six randomised controlled trials (945 total participants) were included. Compared with venous bypass, PTA was associated with a higher likelihood of ulcer healing (risk ratio 1.20; 95% confidence interval 1.07-1.33; p = .0001; low-certainty evidence). No statistically significant differences were observed between revascularisation strategies for mortality or major amputation. Similarly, no significant differences were identified in comparisons of PTA versus drug-coated balloon or drug-coated stent interventions. CONCLUSION: PTA may be associated with improved arterial ulcer healing compared with venous bypass in patients with diabetes, without clear differences in mortality or amputation rates. However, the certainty of evidence is low, and these findings should be interpreted with caution. Further adequately powered randomised trials are required to clarify the comparative effectiveness of infrapopliteal revascularisation strategies.

summary.title_ko: 당뇨 발 궤양 환자의 하지동맥질환에 대한 내피혈관 치료: 무작위 대조 임상시험 시스템 리뷰
summary.one_line: 하지동맥 질환을 가진 당뇨 발 궤양 환자에서 경피적 동맥성형술(PTA)이 정맥 우회술보다 궤양 치유에 더 효과적이지만, 사망률이나 중대한 절단율에는 차이가 없다.
summary.design: 시스템 리뷰 및 메타분석 (무작위 대조 시험 기반)
summary.subjects: 6개 무작위 대조 시험에서 총 945명의 환자
summary.intervention: 경피적 동맥성형술(PTA) vs 정맥 우회술, 경피적 동맥성형술(PTA) vs 약물코팅 밸loon 또는 약물코팅 스텐트 치료법
summary.results: PTA는 정맥 우회술에 비해 궤양 치유 확률이 더 높음 (위험비: 1.20, 신뢰구간: 1.07-1.33, p=0.0001; 낮은 수준의 증거). PTA와 약물코팅 밸loon 또는 스텐트 치료법 간에는 통계적으로 유의미한 차이가 없음.
summary.implication: PTA는 당뇨 발 궤양 환자의 하지동맥질환에서 정맥 우회술보다 궤양 치유에 더 효과적일 수 있으나, 사망률이나 중대한 절단율에는 유의미한 차이가 없음. 그러나 증거의 확실성은 낮으므로 주의해서 해석해야 함. 추가적인 충분히 파워된 무작위 대조 시험을 통해 하지동맥 재관류 전략의 상대적 효과를 명확하게 확인할 필요가 있음.

title: Hips Don't Lie-Hip Embolization for Pain Relief and Functional Improvement.
Treatment of Completely Thrombosed Transjugular Intrahepatic Portosystemic Shunt using Computer-Assisted Vacuum Thrombectomy Device.
Arterial Perfusion Changes Following Transcatheter Arterial Microembolization for Hand Joint Pain.
Interventional Radiology and General Practice in Spain: An Unresolved Opportunity for Clinical Integration.
Intra-Arterial Chemotherapy for Advanced Intraocular Retinoblastoma….
abstract: PURPOSE: To evaluate the safety and efficacy of intra-arterial chemotherapy as a treatment for advanced intraocular retinoblastoma and to present our single-center experience. MATERIALS AND METHODS: This single-center retrospective cohort study included 13 pediatric patients (15 eyes) who underwent intra-arterial chemotherapy between January 2020 and December 2024. Patients were categorized into two groups: those receiving treatment as a first-line option (group 1) and those treated following the failure of previous therapies (group 2). Data were collected on technical success, complications, ocular preservation, and visual function. Each patient was monitored for a minimum of 12 months after treatment initiation. RESULTS: According to the ICRB classification, most eyes (66.7%) were Groups D, followed by groups C and E. The mean age at presentation was 22.5 months. A total of 45 intra-arterial chemotherapy procedures were performed, with successful catheterization achieved in 97.8% of cases. Minor procedural complications were observed in 8.8% of sessions, with no serious systemic adverse events. Visual acuity was maintained or improved in 93.3% of treated eyes. No patients required enucleation, and no cases of metastasis or death occurred during follow-up. CONCLUSION: Intra-arterial chemotherapy is a technically feasible and promising globe-sparing treatment for intraocular retinoblastoma, demonstrating high technical success and a favorable safety profile in our cohort. While preliminary outcomes show preserved visual function and high ocular survival, larger studies with longer follow-up are necessary to confirm long-term efficacy and safety within a multidisciplinary framework.

summary.title_ko: 진보된 안내성 망막색소상피암 치료를 위한 동맥 내 화학치료의 안전성 및 유효성 평가
summary.one_line: 동맥 내 화학치료는 진보된 안내성 망막색소상피암 치료에 효과적이고 안전하며, 눈을 보존하는 데 유망한 방법임이 확인되었다.
summary.subjects: 13명의 소아 환자 (15눈)
summary.intervention: 동맥 내 화학치료 (Intra-Arterial Chemotherapy, IAC)
summary.results: 기술 성공률은 97.8%로 높았으며, 부작용은 주로 경미한 절차 관련 문제였고 중대한 체계적 부작용은 없었다. 치료 후 시력 유지 또는 개선율이 93.3%로 나타났다. 환자 중 어느 누구도 눈 제거 수술을 필요로 하지 않았으며, 전이나 사망 사례는 발생하지 않았다.
summary.implication: 동맥 내 화학치료는 망막색소상피암 치료에 있어 기술적으로 가능하며 안전하고 효과적인 방법으로 보존적 치료를 위한 유망한 옵션이다. 그러나 장기 추적 관찰을 통해 더 큰 규모의 연구가 필요하다.

title: Diversity and Sustainability: The Role of Women in the Future of Interventional Radiology.
Complete Occlusion of All Three Mesenteric Arteries with Collateral Supply via Bilateral Internal Mammary Arteries.
Optical See-Through and Video See-Through Head-Mounted Displays for Percutaneous Biopsies: A Comparative Phantom Study.
abstract: PURPOSE: To compare the added benefit of optical see-through, the Magic Leap 2 (ML2), and video see-through, the Apple Vision Pro (AVP), head-mounted displays extended reality (XR) during percutaneous biopsies on an abdominal phantom. MATERIAL AND METHODS: In this phantom-based prospective cohort study, sixteen radiologists (5 experienced and 11 beginners) performed six needle insertions: two without XR, two with ML2, and two with AVP. Two lesions of differing difficulty (depth and proximity to vessels) were targeted. Post-procedure CT measured accuracy (hitting the target and distance and angle to lesion center). Cognitive workload and user experience were assessed using a structured questionnaire with a rating of 0-20. RESULTS: Beginners benefited more from XR than experienced radiologists. Beginners improved their targeting accuracy with XR, especially for the more complex lesion closer to blood vessels, where success rates increased using XR (conventional: 1/11, ML2: 2/11, AVP: 4/11), with a decrease in mean distance to target (conventional: 17.95 ± 9.14 mm; ML2: 14.21 ± 6.27 mm; AVP: 12.02 ± 7.19 mm). Advanced radiologists had overall lower success rates (conventional: 1/5, ML2: 0/5, AVP: 1/5). XR also reduced puncture time for beginner (ML2: 68.1%, AVP: 56.9% of baseline) and advanced radiologists (ML2: 79.0%, AVP: 61.7%). Questionnaire results indicated AVP was perceived as more mentally demanding, particularly by experienced radiologists (mental demand: conventional: 11, ML2: 9, AVP: 12, for beginners, and conventional: 12, ML2: 11, AVP: 17, for advanced). Beginners adapted well to both systems, showing no significant difference in perceived workload compared to conventional puncture and similar performance levels (conventional: 9, ML2: 9, AVP: 12, for beginners, and conventional: 15, ML2: 11, AVP: 7, for advanced). CONCLUSION: Our work demonstrates that AVP performs similar to ML2 in needle placement tasks and can be used in further research and clinical application in interventional radiology. LEVEL OF EVIDENCE: No level of evidence.

summary.title_ko: 투과형 헤드 마운트 디스플레이를 이용한 경피적 생검에서 광학 투과형과 비디오 투과형의 비교 폐인 연구
summary.one_line: Magic Leap 2와 Apple Vision Pro를 사용한 투과형 헤드 마운트 디스플레이가 초음파 안내 경피적 생검에서 초보자에게 더 큰 이점을 제공하는 것으로 나타났다.
summary.subjects: 16명의 방사선 전문의 (경험자 5명, 초보자 11명)
summary.intervention: 투과형 헤드 마운트 디스플레이(Magic Leap 2와 Apple Vision Pro)를 이용한 경피적 생검
summary.results: 초보 방사선 전문의는 XR을 사용할 때 더 높은 정확도를 보였으며, 특히 혈관에 가까운 복잡한 장애물이 있는 경우 성공률이 증가하였다. (Magic Leap 2: 18%, Apple Vision Pro: 36%). 또한 초보자와 고급 전문의 모두 XR을 사용할 때 시간 단축 효과를 보였다.
summary.implication: Apple Vision Pro는 Magic Leap 2와 유사한 성능을 보여, 향후 연구 및 임상 적용에서 더 많은 활용이 가능하다.

title: Clinical Trials in Interventional Oncology: A Field Growing Up Fast.
Meta-Analysis: The Holy Grail?
abstract: INTRODUCTION: Meta-analysis is often regarded as a cornerstone of evidence synthesis, yet its application in interventional oncology (IO) is challenged by heterogeneous study designs, rapidly evolving technologies, and limited availability of randomized controlled trials. This review evaluates the current state of evidence in IO, emphasizing the role of systematic reviews and meta-analyses in guiding clinical decision-making. METHODS: To evaluate the level of evidence of the published studies within IO, a PubMed search was conducted with the aim to identify the various article types that have been published over the past decades. RESULTS: Over the past decades, the number of original articles has remained relatively stable. A notable observation is the significant increase in the number of systematic reviews and meta-analyses, particularly when compared to the relatively unchanged volume of original articles. DISCUSSION: This trend suggests a growing emphasis on evaluating existing research rather than generating new prospective studies. The grading of recommendations assessment, development and evaluation (GRADE) approach to assess evidence quality, the importance of adhering to Preferred Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews and Meta-Analyses (PRISMA) guidelines, and common challenges like risk of bias and publication bias will be discussed within this context. CONCLUSION: Ultimately, meta-analysis should not be viewed as a definitive benchmark in IO, but as a methodological tool of which conclusions depend heavily on the quality, consistency, and relevance of the underlying studies.

summary.title_ko: 메타분석: 인터벤션 종양학에서의 역할과 한계
summary.one_line: 인터벤션 종양학 분야에서 메타분석의 현재 상태와 그 중요성에 대한 평가
summary.subjects: 문헌 검색을 통해 식별된 다양한 연구 유형 (연구 수는 시간 경과에 따른 변화를 보임)
summary.intervention: 시스템 리뷰와 메타분석을 통한 임상 의사결정 지침 제공
summary.results: 최근 몇 년 동안 원저의 수가 상대적으로 안정적이었으나, 시스템 리뷰 및 메타분석의 수는 크게 증가함. 이는 새로운 전망적 연구보다 기존 연구 평가에 더 큰 중점을 두고 있음을 나타냄.
summary.implication: 인터벤션 종양학에서 메타분석은 결정적인 지표로 보다는 방법론 도구로서, 결론의 정확성은 기본 연구의 품질, 일관성 및 관련성을 크게 의존함.

title: Gastrointestinal Safety of Left Hepatic Lobe Radiation Segmentectomy-Reassuring Data with Room for Further Investigation.

abstract: PURPOSE: To evaluate the safety and rates of bridging or downstaging following segmental transarterial radioembolization (TARE) in hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC) patients with baseline hyperbilirubinemia (total bilirubin [TBili] ≥2.0 mg/dL). MATERIALS AND METHODS: This single-institution retrospective study included 119 HCC patients (median age: 64 years, IQR: 58-71) with baseline hyperbilirubinemia who underwent 129 segmental TARE procedures between 2006 and 2021. Baseline and post-treatment liver function, toxicities, overall survival (OS), and bridging/downstaging rates were analyzed. Patients were stratified by treatment intent: palliative, bridging, or downstaging. RESULTS: The median absorbed dose was 211 Gy (IQR: 157-318), treatment volume 160 cc (IQR: 109-227), whole liver volume 1402 cc (IQR: 1136-1830), and percentage of liver treated 11.0% (IQR: 8.2-15.5). Median baseline TBili was 2.7 mg/dL (IQR: 2.3-3.2). Grade 3/4 bilirubin toxicity occurred in 1.0% at 1 and 3 months, and 8.0% at 6 months. Although TBili (P=0.011) and albumin (P=0.047) changed significantly over time, post-hoc testing showed no differences between timepoints, and ALBI grade remained stable (P=0.900). Median intention-to-treat OS was not reached (95% CI: 59.0 months-not calculable [NC]). The palliative group had a median OS of 22.0 months (95% CI: 18.0-NC), while OS was not reached in the bridging group. Among 71 bridging patients, 92.0% remained within Milan criteria and 78.0% underwent transplantation. Of 6 downstaging patients, 67.0% were successfully downstaged, and 2 underwent transplantation. CONCLUSION: Segmental TARE is safe and well tolerated in HCC patients with baseline hyperbilirubinemia, achieving high rates of successful bridging and downstaging to liver transplant with manageable toxicity.

summary.title_ko: 기저 고빌리루빈혈증을 가진 간세포암 환자에서 세그먼트별 방사능색전술(TARE)의 안전성 및 다운스테이징률 평가
summary.one_line: 기저 고빌리루빈혈증을 가진 간세포암 환자에서 세그먼트별 TARE는 높은 다운스테이징률과 관리 가능한 독성을 보이며 안전하게 수행될 수 있음.
summary.subjects: 119명의 간세포암 환자 (중앙값 연령: 64세, IQR: 58-71)
summary.intervention: 세그먼트별 방사능색전술(TARE)
summary.results: TARE 후 중등도 이상의 빌리루빈 독성은 1개월 및 3개월 시점에서 각각 1.0%, 6개월 시점에서 8.0%로 관찰되었음. 전체 생존기간(OS) 중앙값은 대수술 그룹에서는 도달하지 않았고, 보조 치료 그룹에서는 22.0개월 (95% CI: 18.0-NC)이었음.
summary.implication: 기저 고빌리루빈혈증을 가진 간세포암 환자에서 세그먼트별 TARE는 높은 다운스테이징률과 관리 가능한 독성을 보이며 안전하게 수행될 수 있음을 시사함.
summary.detailed_results: TARE의 중앙값 흡수량은 211 Gy (IQR: 157-318), 치료 부피는 160 cc (IQR: 109-227)였음. 전체 간 부피는 1402 cc (IQR: 1136-1830)로, 치료받은 간 부피의 비율은 중앙값으로 11.0% (IQR: 8.2-15.5)였음. 기저 TBili는 중앙값으로 2.7 mg/dL (IQR: 2.3-3.2)로 관찰되었으며, 시간 경과에 따라 TBili와 알부민 수치가 유의하게 변화하였으나, ALBI 등급은 안정적이었음. 다운스테이징 그룹에서 67.0%가 성공적으로 다운스테이징 되었고, 이중 2명이 간 이식을 받았으며, 브리지링 그룹에서는 92.0%가 미란 기준 내에 있었음.
summary.critique: 연구는 단일 기관에서 수행된 후향적 연구로, 잠재적인 선택 편향이 있을 수 있음. 또한, TARE의 효과를 평가하는 데 있어 간 이식을 받은 환자들의 비율이 상대적으로 낮았으며, 이를 고려할 필요성이 있음.
summary.clinical_application: 기저 고빌리루빈혈증을 가진 간세포암 환자의 치료 옵션으로 세그먼트별 TARE를 고려할 수 있으며, 이는 높은 다운스테이징률과 관리 가능한 독성을 보이는 것으로 나타남.

abstract: Percutaneous transhepatic biliary drainage (PTBD) is an alternative approach for biliary drainage in patients for whom endoscopic retrograde biliary drainage is not available due to surgically altered anatomy or poor clinical status; however, it remains technically challenging with non-dilated bile ducts. This retrospective study evaluated the technical feasibility and safety of puncture of preexisting endoscopic biliary stents to opacify the biliary system and facilitate PTBD. Seventeen procedures in 15 patients with non-dilated bile ducts were included. Technical success, adverse events, procedural details, and subsequent stent management were assessed. All procedures were technically successful. No severe adverse events occurred, and stent puncture was not associated with stent damage or difficulty in subsequent stent management. Reintervention was required in 3 cases. Despite the retrospective design and small sample size, these findings suggest direct puncture of preexisting endoscopic stents is a safe and feasible option for PTBD in patients with non-dilated bile ducts.

summary.title_ko: 내시경 담도 스텐트를 통한 경피적 담관 조영술을 이용한 PTBD의 기술적 가능성과 안전성 평가
summary.one_line: 내시경 담도 스텐트를 통한 경피적 담관 조영술은 비확장된 담관에서 PTBD의 안전하고 실용적인 방법임을 확인하였다.
summary.subjects: 15명의 환자, 총 17건의 시술
summary.intervention: 기존 내시경 담도 스텐트를 통한 경피적 담관 조영술 및 PTBD
summary.results: 모든 시술이 기술적으로 성공하였으며 중대한 부작용은 없었다. 또한, 스텐트 펀칭은 후속 스텐트 관리에 문제가 되지 않았다.
summary.implication: 비확장된 담관에서 PTBD를 수행할 때 기존 내시경 담도 스텐트를 통한 경피적 담관 조영술이 안전하고 실용적인 방법임을 시사한다.
summary.detailed_results: 15명의 환자 중 3명은 재시술이 필요하였으며, 전체적으로 시술 기간 동안 중대한 부작용은 발생하지 않았다. 평균 추적 기간은 제공되지 않았으나, 모든 환자의 후속 스텐트 관리에 문제가 없었다.
summary.critique: 연구는 후향적이며 샘플 사이즈가 작아 일반화하기 어렵다는 한계점이 있다. 또한, 연구 결과의 외삽성을 확인하기 위해서는 추가적인 전향적 연구가 필요하다.
summary.clinical_application: 비확장된 담관에서 PTBD를 수행할 때 기존 내시경 담도 스텐트를 통한 경피적 담관 조영술은 안전하고 실용적이며, 특히 내시경 접근이 어려운 환자들에게 유용하다.

abstract: PURPOSE: To assess the feasibility, safety, and effectiveness of superselective transarterial embolization (TAE) using imipenem/cilastatin sodium for plantar fasciitis (PF) refractory to conservative management. MATERIALS AND METHODS: This retrospective study included 12 patients (50% men; mean age, 36 years [SD ± 9.07]) with PF (pain on palpation along the proximal plantar fascia and thickened plantar fascia [>4 mm] on magnetic resonance [MR] imaging) refractory to conservative management for ≥3 months. Superselective cannulation of branches from the posterior tibial artery (PTA), supplying the point of maximal pain at the plantar fascia origin, was performed, and branches showing hypervascular staining (contrast blush) were embolized using a suspension of 500 mg of imipenem/cilastatin sodium in 5 mL of iodinated contrast agent. Visual analog scale (VAS) was used to assess pain at baseline, 1 day, 1 week, 1 month, 3 months, 6 months, 9 months, and 12 months after procedure. RESULTS: PTA branches supplying area of hypervascular staining could be superselectively embolized in 11 of 12 patients (technical success, 91.7%; mean number of arteries embolized, 1.5 [SD ± 0.7]; mean amount of embolizing agent used, 1.1 mL [SD ± 0.5]). A significant decrease in VAS score was noted on day 1 after procedure (2.27 [SD ±1.19] vs 7.36 [SD ± 0.92]; P < .0001), which persisted through 12 months of follow-up. Clinical success, defined as ≥50% reduction in VAS score at 6 months, was achieved in 8 of 11 (72.73%) patients who underwent embolization and was sustained through 12 months of follow-up. CONCLUSIONS: Superselective TAE using imipenem/cilastatin sodium is feasible, safe, and effective in alleviating pain associated with PF refractory to conservative management, with a low risk of adverse events.

summary.title_ko: 아미카신/실라스틴 나트륨을 이용한 초선택적 경동맥 색전술(TAE)이 만성 발바닥 페시티스에 대한 치료 효과를 평가
summary.one_line: 초선택적 TAE는 만성 발바닥 페시티스 환자에서 통증 완화에 효과적이며 안전하다.
summary.subjects: 12명의 만성 발바닥 페시티스 환자 (평균 연령: 36세, 남성 50%)
summary.intervention: 초선택적 경동맥 색전술(TAE)을 이용한 아미카신/실라스틴 나트륨 주입
summary.results: 기술 성공률은 91.7%였으며, 통증 평가 지표(VAS)는 시술 후 1일에 2.27 (SD ±1.19)로 대폭 감소하여 1년 동안 지속되었다. 임상적 성공률(6개월 후 VAS 점수 50% 이상 감소)은 72.73%를 기록했다.
summary.implication: 초선택적 TAE는 만성 발바닥 페시티스 환자에서 통증 완화에 효과적이며, 보존적인 치료법으로 치료가 어려운 경우 안전하고 효과적인 대안이 될 수 있다.

abstract: PURPOSE: To compare traditional minimally invasive treatments for necrotizing pancreatitis with a novel percutaneous approach, drain irrigation with vacuum assistance (DIVA) necrosectomy. MATERIALS AND METHODS: In this retrospective, single-center study, 20 patients with necrotizing pancreatitis treated with minimally invasive necrosectomy between June 2022 and June 2024 at a tertiary care center were reviewed: 6 received DIVA, and 14 received video-assisted retroperitoneal debridement (VARD) or endoscopic transgastric necrosectomy (ETN). In the DIVA procedure, a suction device is inserted in a mature drain tract in tandem with an irrigation catheter, and vacuum debridement is performed with negative pressure reaching 98.9 kPa. Demographic data and preprocedural severity were recorded. The number of procedures each patient underwent, time to imaging resolution, and the number and nature of adverse events experienced were compared between the DIVA and VARD/ETN groups. RESULTS: Patients who underwent DIVA had higher disease severity at presentation (Acute Physiology and Chronic Health Evaluation II score, 15.0 vs 6.5; P = .012) and reached resolution of abdominal fluid collections more quickly (48.8 days vs 110.1 days, P = .017). DIVA patients all reached resolution, whereas only 12 (86%) of 14 VARD/ETN reached resolution. Additionally, DIVA trended toward fewer adverse events, although this difference was not statistically significant (risk ratio, 0.20; 95% CI, 0.03-1.5; P = .161). CONCLUSIONS: Despite higher disease severity at presentation, patients undergoing image-guided DIVA necrosectomy experienced a faster resolution than VARD/ETN patients. These preliminary results warrant further research into DIVA's role in treatment of necrotizing pancreatitis.

summary.title_ko: DIVA와 기존 최소 침습법을 이용한 죽상성 담관염 치료 비교
summary.one_line: DIVA는 더 심각한 상태에서 빠른 회복을 보여, 추가 연구가 필요하다.
summary.subjects: 20명의 죽상성 담관염 환자 (DIVA 그룹: 6명, VARD/ETN 그룹: 14명)
summary.intervention:
DIVA 시술: 음압(98.9 kPa)을 사용한 청소 및 농양 제거
VARD/ETN: 비디오 보조 후복막적 농양 제거 또는 내시경 경구적 농양 제거
summary.results: DIVA 그룹은 더 심각한 상태에서 시작했지만, VARD/ETN 그룹보다 빠른 회복을 보였음 (평균 이미지 해소 시간: DIVA 48.8일 vs VARD/ETN 110.1일; P = .017). 또한 DIVA 그룹은 모든 환자가 완전히 회복되었으며, 부작용 발생률이 더 낮게 나타났으나 통계적으로 유의미하지는 않았음 (위험비: 0.20; 95% 신뢰구간: 0.03-1.5; P = .161).
summary.implication: DIVA 시술은 초기 더 심각한 상태에서도 빠른 회복을 보여, 죽상성 담관염 치료에서 DIVA의 역할에 대한 추가 연구가 필요하다.

abstract: PURPOSE: To investigate the effect of parathyroid adenoma location on treatment success and adverse events. MATERIALS AND METHODS: A retrospective, observational case study included 285 patients with parathyroid adenomas treated at a single center. Preprocedural and postprocedural blood parameters, ultrasound (US) findings, and parathyroid adenoma locations (Perrier classification) were investigated in relation to procedural success and adverse events. Procedural success was defined as the patient's calcium and parathyroid hormone levels remaining within normal limits for at least 6 months of follow-up and the gradual reduction in size and absence of blood flow in the parathyroid adenoma on control Doppler US. RESULTS: Overall procedural success was 88.4%, and the risk of transient hoarseness was 3.8% in all groups. In the Perrier Type D group, located near the recurrent laryngeal nerve, the procedure success rate was lowest at 72.2%. However, no significant differences were found between location groups in terms of the risk of transient hoarseness or procedure success. CONCLUSIONS: Microwave ablation therapy of patathyroid adenomas has a high success rate across all locations and a low risk of adverse events. In Perrier Type D adenomas, the success rate was lower; however, this difference did not reach statistical significance.

summary.title_ko: 갑상선 기능항진증 병변 위치가 치료 성공률과 부작용에 미치는 영향
summary.one_line: 갑상선 기능항진증 병변 위치와 관계없이 마이크로파 점화 요법의 성공률은 높고 부작용 위험도 낮으나, Perrier 분류 D 유형에서는 성공률이 상대적으로 낮음
summary.subjects: 갑상선 기능항진증 병변을 가진 환자 285명
summary.intervention: 마이크로파 점화 요법
summary.results: 전체 성공률은 88.4%였으며, 일시적 목소리 저하 위험은 모든 그룹에서 3.8%였다. Perrier 분류 D 유형(재생성 신경 근처)에서는 절차 성공률이 가장 낮았으나 (72.2%), 위치에 따른 부작용 위험이나 절차 성공률의 통계적으로 유의미한 차이는 없었다.
summary.implication: 마이크로파 점화 요법은 갑상선 기능항진증 병변의 모든 위치에서 높은 성공률과 낮은 부작용 위험을 보임. 그러나 Perrier 분류 D 유형에서는 성공률이 상대적으로 낮으나, 이 차이는 통계적으로 유의미하지 않았다.

abstract: PURPOSE: To evaluate the incidence and clinical course of lower-limb lymphedema following intranodal n-butyl-2-cyanoacrylate (nBCA) embolization of the inguinal lymph nodes for postoperative lymphorrhea. MATERIALS AND METHODS: This retrospective study included 26 patients (24 men and 2 women; age, 69.5 years) who underwent intranodal nBCA embolization for postoperative lymphorrhea between 2017 and 2023. Under ultrasound (US) guidance, inguinal lymph nodes were punctured, and embolization was performed with nBCA and ethiodized oil at a 2:1 ratio (ethiodized oil:nBCA). The primary approach was to embolize through the initially accessed lymph node when the efferent channel and leakage site were visualized. Clinical success was defined as improvement of lymphorrhea-related symptoms with catheter removal or ≥80% drainage reduction within 21 days. Lower-limb lymphedema was defined as new-onset or worsening of existing edema in 60 days after embolization and categorized as reversible or persistent. RESULTS: Clinical success was achieved in 24 of 26 patients (92.3%), with a median time to resolution of 6 days (range, 2-21 days). Lower-limb lymphedema worsened in 6 patients (23.1%), including 4 reversible and 2 persistent cases. No new-onset lymphedema occurred; all represented exacerbation of pre-existing edema. Both persistent cases involved patients with prior pelvic lymph node dissection. No procedure-related deaths or major complications occurred. CONCLUSION: Inguinal intranodal nBCA embolization effectively controls postoperative lymphorrhea but may worsen pre-existing lower-limb lymphedema, particularly in patients with prior pelvic lymph node dissection. To minimize nontarget embolization of lower-extremity drainage pathways, lymphatic embolization should be performed as selectively and as close to the leakage site as possible.

summary.title_ko: inguinal 림프절 내부 n-부틸-2-사이아노아크릴레이트 색전술 후 하지 림페데마 발생 및 임상 경과 평가
summary.one_line: inguinal 림프절 내부 nBCA 색전술은 수술 후 림포리에라를 효과적으로 제어하지만, 기존의 하지 림페데마 악화를 유발할 수 있다.
summary.subjects: 26명 (남성 24명, 여성 2명; 평균 연령 69.5세)
summary.intervention: inguinal 림프절 내부 n-부틸-2-사이아노아크릴레이트(nBCA) 색전술
summary.results: 임상적 성공률은 24명 (92.3%)으로, 평균적으로 6일 후 증상이 호전되었다. 색전술 이후 하지 림페데마가 악화된 환자는 6명 (23.1%)로, 그 중 4명은 일시적인 악화였고 2명은 지속적인 악화였다. 모든 경우는 기존의 부종이 악화된 것이었으며, 두 명의 지속적 림페데마 환자는 과거에 펄스 림프절 절제술을 받았던 환자들이었다.
summary.implication: inguinal 림프절 내부 nBCA 색전술은 수술 후 림포리에라를 효과적으로 제어할 수 있으나, 이전 펄스 림프절 절제술을 받았던 환자에서 기존의 하지 림페데마 악화가 발생할 가능성이 있다. 따라서 비목적 색전을 최소화하기 위해 가능한 한 빠르게 누수 부위에 가까운 위치에서 선택적으로 색전술을 수행해야 한다.

abstract: PURPOSE: To assess the effectiveness and safety of bronchial arterial chemoembolization (BACE) combined with tislelizumab for advanced non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC). MATERIALS AND METHODS: In a prospective single-arm, Phase II study, patients with Stage IIIA-IIIC NSCLC who refused or were ineligible for standard treatments were enrolled. Patients received BACE followed by 200-mg tislelizumab every 3 weeks until disease progression, intolerable toxicities, or discontinuation determined by the investigators. The primary endpoint was progression-free survival (PFS); secondary endpoints were overall survival (OS), objective response rate (ORR), disease control rate (DCR), safety, and quality of life (QoL). RESULTS: Thirty patients (median age, 67 years, 24 men) were enrolled between December 2021 and August 2022. The median follow-up was 23 months (95% CI, 21.5-24.5). At data cutoff (March 1, 2024), median PFS was 10.5 months (95% CI, 7.8-13.2), and median OS was 15.0 months (95% CI, 8.2-21.8). ORR was 60.0% (18 of 30 patients), and DCR was 80.0% (24 of 30 patients). PD-L1 expression, tumor feeding arteries, and previous treatment history were prognostic factors for PFS and OS. Throughout the treatment and follow-up period, no Grade ≥3 treatment-related adverse events (TRAEs) were observed, as assessed by the Common Terminology Criteria for Adverse Events (CTCAE) version 4.0. Common Grade 1-2 TRAEs were nausea, chest pain, and anemia. QoL (global, physical, and emotional functioning) improved significantly after 1 treatment cycle versus baseline. CONCLUSIONS: The prospective study suggests that BACE plus tislelizumab offer promising effectiveness and acceptable safety in advanced NSCLC, supporting further randomized trials.

summary.title_ko: 브론хи올라르 아테리올 케모색전술과 tislelizumab 병용 요법이 진행성 비소세포폐암에서의 효과와 안전성 평가
summary.one_line: 브론хи올라르 아테리올 케모색전술(BACE)과 tislelizumab 병용요법은 진행성 비소세포폐암(NSCLC) 환자에서 유의한 효과와 관용 가능한 안전성을 보여주며, 추가 임상시험을 지원한다.
summary.subjects: Stage IIIA-IIIC 비소세포폐암(NSCLC) 환자, N=30
summary.intervention: 브론хи올라르 아테리올 케모색전술(BACE) 후 tislelizumab 200mg 주사, 3주 간격으로 진행성 또는 부작용 발생 시까지 투여
summary.results: 진행무반응기간(PFS): 중앙값 10.5개월 (95% CI: 7.8-13.2), 전체 생존기간(OS): 중앙값 15.0개월 (95% CI: 8.2-21.8), 객관적 반응률(ORR): 60.0%, 질병 통제율(DCR): 80.0%. 주요 부작용은 등급 1-2의 구역질, 가슴통증 및 빈혈이었으며, 중등도 이상의 부작용은 관찰되지 않았다.
summary.implication: BACE와 tislelizumab 병용 요법은 진행성 비소세포폐암(NSCLC) 환자에서 유의한 효과를 보여주며, 추가 임상적 연구가 필요하다.

abstract: PURPOSE: To evaluate the contralateral suppression index (CSI) as a diagnostic tool for predicting aldosterone lateralization under simulated incomplete adrenal vein sampling (AVS) and to assess the impact of adrenal nodules and age on its performance. MATERIALS AND METHODS: This study retrospectively reviewed consecutive patients who underwent AVS for primary aldosteronism between January 1, 2016, and June 30, 2024. A total of 362 patients were analyzed. Bilaterally selective studies were reanalyzed by masking 1 adrenal side to simulate incomplete sampling. CSI was calculated from the available adrenal vein and inferior vena cava samples and tested across 3 thresholds (≥1.0, ≥0.5, and ≥0.2) using lateralization index (LI) ≥4.0 as the reference. Performance metrics included positive predictive value (PPV), sensitivity, and specificity, overall and stratified by adrenal nodules and age (<35 vs ≥35 years). RESULTS: Mean CSI was 0.33 in lateralized cases (LI ≥ 4.0) and 3.16 in nonlateralized cases (P < .001). Without a concordant nodule, CSI ≤1 supported lateralization (PPV, 70%; sensitivity, 88%; specificity, 94%); stricter thresholds increased certainty, with CSI ≤0.5 yielding a PPV of 98% and specificity of 99% (sensitivity, 61%) and CSI ≤0.2 achieving a PPV and specificity of 100% (sensitivity, 28%). With a concordant nodule, PPVs were 94%, 99%, and 100% at CSIs ≤1, ≤0.5, and ≤0.2, respectively, with sensitivity of 98%-64% . Results were consistent across age groups. CONCLUSIONS: CSI reliably predicted aldosterone lateralization under simulated incomplete AVS. Thresholds of ≤0.5 and ≤0.2 provided confirmatory accuracy, particularly when combined with concordant imaging.

summary.title_ko: 알도스테론 측면화 예측을 위한 대조측 억제 지수(CSI)의 진단 도구로서의 가치 평가
summary.one_line: 대조측 억제 지수가 시뮬레이션된 부정확한 부신 정맥 샘플링(AVS) 조건 하에서 알도스테론 측면화를 예측하는 데 효과적임을 확인하고, 나이와 부신 결절의 존재가 CSI 성능에 미치는 영향을 평가함.
summary.subjects: 2016년 1월 1일부터 2024년 6월 30일까지 부신 정맥 샘플링(AVS)을 받은 원발성 알도스테론증 환자 362명
summary.intervention: 부정확한 AVS를 시뮬레이션하기 위해 한 쪽 부신의 데이터를 가려서 양측 선택적 연구 재분석, 대조측 억제 지수(CSI) 계산 및 세 가지 임계값(≥1.0, ≥0.5, ≥0.2)에서 성능 평가
summary.results: CSI의 평균 값은 측면화된 경우(LI ≥4.0)에 0.33이었고 비측면화된 경우에 3.16으로 차이가 유의미(P < .001). CSI ≤1은 측면화를 지지하는 높은 양성 예측도(PPV, 70%), 민감도(88%), 특이도(94%)를 보였으며, 더 엄격한 임계값(CSI ≤0.5)은 PPV가 98%, 특이도가 99%로 상승했음. CSI ≤0.2는 PPV와 특이도 모두 100%를 달성했으나 민감도는 28%로 감소함. 부신 결절과 함께 CSI를 사용하면 PPV가 향상되었으며, 나이에 따른 결과 일관성이 확인됨.
summary.implication: 대조측 억제 지수(CSI)는 시뮬레이션된 부정확한 AVS 조건 하에서도 알도스테론 측면화를 예측하는 데 신뢰성을 제공하며, 특히 엄격한 임계값(CSI ≤0.5 및 ≤0.2)과 함께 결절이 있는 경우에 더욱 정확함.

abstract: PURPOSE: To investigate whether transarterial embolization (TAE) and systemic gemcitabine + cisplatin (GC) modulates CD4+CD25+Foxp3+ regulatory T cells (Tregs) infiltration, a major immunosuppressive subset, and expression of vascular endothelial growth factor (VEGF), a critical proangiogenic molecule, in a thioacetamide-induced orthotopic intrahepatic cholangiocarcinoma (ICC) model using male Sprague-Dawley (SD) rats. MATERIALS AND METHODS: Twenty-four ICC-bearing SD rats were randomized into 4 groups (n = 6 per group). The control group received no treatment, whereas the GC group was given intraperitoneal injections of gemcitabine (200 mg/kg) plus cisplatin (8 mg/kg) on Days 0, 4, 8, and 12. The TAE group underwent hepatic artery embolization on Day 0, and the combination group received TAE on Day 0 followed by GC administration. Tumor volume was measured via computed tomography (CT) on Days -1, 7, and 14. Flow cytometry determined the proportion of Tregs among CD4+ T cells. Intratumoral Treg density is quantified by immunofluorescence. Immunohistochemistry detected VEGF expression. Statistical analysis used 1-way analysis of variance with appropriate post hoc tests. RESULTS: There were no significant tumor volume differences within 14 days. TAE increased peripheral Treg proportion, whereas GC and combination therapy reduced it. The combination group had the lowest intratumoral Treg proportion (5.25% [SEM ± 0.76]). VEGF expression was elevated in the TAE group but suppressed in the combination group (8.68% [SEM ± 1.36] vs control, 18.37% [SEM ± 3.24]; P = .0140). All treatment groups showed reduced intratumoral Treg density compared with the control. CONCLUSIONS: In a thioacetamide-induced orthotopic ICC rat model, TAE combined with systemic GC reduces intratumoral Treg infiltration and VEGF expression. These findings indicate that the combination therapy exerts superior immunomodulatory effects compared with TAE or GC monotherapy in rats.

summary.title_ko: 간동맥색전술과 체계적인 제미타빈 + 시스플라틴 병용 치료가 담도암 모델에서 Tregs 및 VEGF에 미치는 영향
summary.one_line: 간동맥색전술(TAE)과 체계적 제미타빈 + 시스플라틴(GC) 병용 치료가 담도암 동물 모델에서 Tregs와 VEGF의 분비를 감소시키는 효과를 보임
summary.subjects: ICC를 유발한 남성 Sprague-Dawley 대수 24마리

intervention.GC_group: 제미타빈(200 mg/kg) + 시스플라틴(8 mg/kg) 복강 주사 (일주일에 한 번)

intervention.combination_group: TAE 후 제미타빈 + 시스플라틴 병용 치료

results.tumor_volume: 14일 이내에 모든 그룹에서 종양 부피 차이 없음

results.peripheral_Treg_proportion: TAE는 말초 Tregs 비율 증가, GC 및 병용 치료로 감소 (병용 치료 그룹: 5.25% [SEM ± 0.76])

results.intratumoral_Treg_density: 모든 치료 그룹에서 종양 내 Tregs 밀도 감소

results.VEGF_expression: TAE 그룹에서 VEGF 발현 증가, 병용 치료 그룹에서 감소 (병용 치료 그룹: 8.68% [SEM ± 1.36] vs 대조군: 18.37% [SEM ± 3.24], P = .0140)

summary.implication: 간동맥색전술과 체계적 제미타빈 + 시스플라틴 병용 치료는 담도암 동물 모델에서 종양 내 Tregs 및 VEGF의 분비를 감소시켜 면역 조절 효과가 단독 치료보다 우수함을 나타냄

abstract: PURPOSE: To provide recommendations for the most appropriate endovascular intervention of femoropopliteal (FP) arterial disease based on plaque characterization. MATERIALS AND METHODS: A panel of 22 physicians from multiple disciplines participated in a modified Delphi consensus, leveraging the RAND/UCLA Appropriateness Method. Panelists engaged in 2 rounds of voting, following a literature review, with an in-person discussion prior to the second round of voting. A rigorous statistical approach was used to analyze the points of agreement and disagreement. Consensus-based recommendations on the most appropriate endovascular approaches for treating patients with FP lesions, stratified by lesion morphology, were generated. RESULTS: Overall, 490 individual items were included in the voting, 458 (93%) of which achieved consensus and 32 (7%) were nonconsensus items, based on a priori criteria under the following categories: (a) recommendations on method for determining plaque morphology, (b) preferred endovascular devices for vessel preparation and definitive treatment stratified by (i) plaque morphology and (ii) Tosaka classification of in-stent restenosis, and (c) vessel preparation device safety-related considerations. CONCLUSIONS: This international, multidisciplinary consensus provides evidence- and expert-informed recommendations for vessel preparation and definitive treatment of FP arterial disease, tailored to plaque morphology. These consensus recommendations aim to support clinical decision making and promote best interventional practices by serving as an expert opinion supplement to existing guideline-based care pathways.

summary.title_ko: 혈관 내 치료를 위한 대퇴부-무릎동맥 동맥질환 치료에 대한 플라크 특성화 기반 권장사항
summary.one_line: 다양한 전문가 그룹의 토론을 통해 FP 동맥 질환 치료에서 가장 적절한 혈관 내 중재 방법을 제안합니다.
summary.subjects: 22명의 다학제 전문가들
summary.intervention: FP 동맥 질환 치료를 위한 혈관 내 중재 방법, 플라크 형태에 따른 기기 준비 및 정식 치료법 선정
summary.results: 490개 항목을 대상으로 투표가 이루어졌으며, 이 중 93%인 458개 항목이 콘센서스를 이루었고, 나머지 7%는 비콘센서스로 분류되었습니다.
summary.implication: FP 동맥 질환 치료에서 플라크 형태에 따른 혈관 내 중재 방법을 제안하여 임상 의사 결정을 지원하고 최선의 치료 전략을 촉진합니다.

abstract: PURPOSE: To assess the safety of adrenal biopsies in patients with known or suspected malignancies without preprocedural endocrine evaluations. MATERIALS AND METHODS: This was a single-center retrospective study that included 426 patients (249 men and 177 women; mean age, 66.1 years [SD ± 11.0]) with known or suspected malignancy who underwent 487 computed tomography (CT)-guided adrenal biopsies between October 2011 and December 2023. The authors analyzed medical records and cross-sectional imaging, evaluating technical and diagnostic success rates as well as complications. RESULTS: Of the 487 biopsies, 442 (91%) were performed in patients with confirmed malignancies, whereas 45 cases (9%) were patients presenting with new abdominal or lung mass and adrenal mass. The most common primary malignancy was lung cancer (272 of 487, 56%). Technical success rate was 99.8% (486 of 487), with a diagnostic success rate of 97.1% (473 of 487). Histopathological findings differed from known primary malignancy in 2.9% (14 of 487) of cases. Endocrine assessments were performed before 40 biopsies (8.2%). Three (3 of 487, 0.61%) new histological diagnoses of pheochromocytoma emerged, with 2 (66%) occurring in patients with known malignancies. A total of 45 adverse events (9.2%) were observed, primarily Grades 1-2, with only 6 classified as Grade 3 (4 hemorrhages and 2 cases of hypertension). Only 1 case of Grade 3 hypertension linked to pheochromocytoma. CONCLUSIONS: Incidence of pheochromocytoma in patients with known or suspected extra-adrenal malignancies without endocrine workup was less than 1%. Therefore, endocrine workup prior to adrenal biopsies in patients with known and suspected malignancies may not be indicated despite recommendations of international guidelines.

summary.title_ko: 전이성 갑상선암 환자에서 부신 생검의 안전성 평가
summary.one_line: 부신 암환자의 CT 유도 부신 생검은 높은 기술적 및 진단적 성공률을 보였으며, 대부분의 경우 내분비 검사 없이 안전하게 수행될 수 있음.
summary.subjects: 2011년 10월부터 2023년 12월까지 부신 암 또는 의심되는 부신 암을 가진 환자 426명 (남성 249명, 여성 177명; 평균 연령 66.1세 [SD ± 11.0])
summary.intervention: CT 유도 부신 생검 (487건)
summary.results: 기술적 성공률은 99.8% (486/487), 진단적 성공률은 97.1% (473/487)였으며, 내분비 검사를 받은 환자는 전체의 8.2%(40명)에 불과했음. 부신 생검으로 인한 부작용 발생률은 9.2%로 주로 등급 1-2의 부작용이었으며, 등급 3 이상의 중등도 부작용은 6건 (1.2%)였음.
summary.implication: 부신 암 또는 의심되는 부신 암 환자에서 CT 유도 부신 생검은 높은 성공률과 낮은 부작용 발생률을 보임. 따라서 국제 가이드라인의 권고와 달리, 내분비 검사를 미리 시행하지 않아도 안전하게 부신 생검을 수행할 수 있음.

abstract: Knee osteoarthritis (OA) is a common cause of disability worldwide, and the prevalence of OA is expected to steadily increase in the coming decades. Current treatment follows a stepwise approach, beginning with conservative measures such as physical therapy and analgesics, progressing to intra-articular injections, and knee arthroplasty reserved for advanced cases. Minimally invasive treatment options are limited and include intra-articular injections, which have mixed long-term effectiveness. Genicular artery embolization (GAE) is a novel transcatheter technique hypothesized to target pathological synovial and subchondral neovascularization, key drivers of inflammation in symptomatic knee OA. As the research on GAE has steadily increased in the last decade, it is important for interventional radiologists to thoroughly understand the pathophysiology of knee OA and how embolization disrupts the cycle of synovial inflammation and nociceptive signaling. This narrative review will examine the key pathophysiological aspects of knee OA, their relationship to pain generation, and the potential therapeutic role of GAE.

summary.title_ko: 무릎 관절염 치료를 위한 신경관개동맥 색전술(GAE)의 잠재적 역할
summary.one_line: 신경관개동맥 색전술이 무릎 관절염에서 통증 발생과 염증 사이의 순환을 중단시키는 역할을 하는 것으로 제안됨.
summary.subjects: 무릎 관절염 환자
summary.intervention: 신경관개동맥 색전술(Genicular Artery Embolization, GAE)
summary.results: GAE는 무릎 관절염에서 통증 발생과 염증 사이의 순환을 중단시키는 것으로 보고됨. 그러나 장기 효과에 대한 연구가 더 필요함.
summary.implication: GAE는 무릎 관절염 치료를 위한 새로운 비침습적 옵션으로 고려될 수 있으며, 임상적으로 추가적인 연구와 검증이 요구됨.

abstract: PURPOSE: To compare the effectiveness and safety of endovenous microwave ablation (MWA) versus radiofrequency ablation (RFA) for treating lower limb varicose veins (LLVVs). MATERIALS AND METHODS: A comprehensive search of PubMed, Embase, Scopus, and Web of Science databases identified relevant randomized controlled trials (RCTs) and observational studies comparing MWA and RFA for LLVV. Primary endpoints were occlusion rates and quality of life (QoL). Secondary outcomes included hospitalization days, procedural time, blood loss, and adverse events (AEs). Study quality was assessed using Cochrane Risk of Bias Tool and Newcastle-Ottawa scale. A random-effects meta-analysis was conducted with Review Manager 5.4 (The Cochrane Collaboration, Copenhagen, Denmark), including a leave-one-out sensitivity analysis. RESULTS: Four studies (1 RCT and 3 cohort studies) with 887 patients (436 who underwent MWA and 451 who underwent RFA) were included. At 1 month, occlusion rates were 100% for both; at 1 year, the pooled occlusion rates remained similarly high (MWA, 97.5%; RFA, 98.0%), with no significant difference observed between groups (odds ratio, 0.80; 95% CI, 0.33-1.92; P = .620; I2 = 0%). QoL scores also showed no significant difference between techniques at 1 year. For secondary outcomes, both procedures demonstrated comparable effectiveness (hospitalization days and procedural time) and AE rates. Sensitivity analysis favored RFA, with fewer hospitalization days (mean difference [MD], 0.14; 95% CI, 0.01-0.27; P = .050; I2 = 0%) and shorter procedural time (MD, 8.68; 95% CI, 6.45-10.90; P < .00001; I2 = 38.0%). CONCLUSIONS: MWA and RFA are safe and highly effective for treating LLVV, demonstrating similar 1-year occlusion rates (97.5% vs 98.0%) and low clinical severity scores.

summary.title_ko: 간静脉微波消融与射频消融治疗下肢静脉曲张的疗效和安全性比较
summary.one_line: 微波消融(MWA)和射频消融(RFA)在治疗下肢静脉曲张(LLVV)方面具有相似的有效性和安全性，但RFA在住院天数和操作时间上略占优势。
summary.subjects: 887명의 환자 (436명이 MWA를 받고, 451명이 RFA를 받음)
summary.intervention: 간静脉微波消融(MWA) vs 射频消融(RFA)治疗下肢静脉曲张
summary.results: 两组在术后一个月和一年的闭塞率分别为100%和97.5%-98.0%，无显著差异；生活质量评分也未见明显不同。次要结果方面，两种方法在住院天数、操作时间和不良事件发生率上表现相当，但敏感性分析显示RFA组平均住院天数更少（均差(MD)：0.14天），且操作时间较短（MD: 8.68分钟）。
summary.implication: 微波消融和射频消融在治疗下肢静脉曲张方面具有相似的长期闭塞率和低临床严重程度评分，但射频消融可能由于其更短的操作时间和住院天数而更具优势。

abstract: PURPOSE: To analyze the safety and effectiveness of covered balloon-expandable (CBE) stent grafts for treatment of aortoiliac occlusive disease (AIOD) from publications between 2000 and 2024. MATERIALS AND METHODS: A PubMed systematic literature review search was conducted to expand a previous review (2000-2019) and include publications between 2020 and 2024. Terms included balloon-expandable/expanding, iliac, and specific stent graft names. Study eligibility criteria included ≥5 patients with AIOD treated with CBE stents and reports of patency or freedom from target lesion revascularization (fTLR). Primary, primary-assisted, and secondary patency and fTLR rates at 1, 6, 9, 12, 24, 36, 48, and 60 months were analyzed. RESULTS: The search identified 252 records; 25 studies (29 publications) met eligibility, resulting in 1,983 patients included in the meta-analysis. The stent grafts included Advanta V12 Balloon Expandable Covered Stent/iCast Covered Stent System (Advanta V12/iCast; Getinge Maquet, Rastatt, Germany), GORE VIABAHN VBX Balloon Expandable Endoprosthesis (VBX Stent Graft; W. L. Gore & Associates, Inc. Flagstaff, Arizona), BeGraft Peripheral Stent Graft System and/or BeGraft Peripheral Plus Stent Graft (Bentley InnoMed GmbH, Hechingen, Germany), LifeStream Balloon Expandable Vascular Covered Stent (Becton Dickenson, Tempe, Arizona), iCover Stent Graft (iVascular, Barcelona, Spain), and mixed-device cohorts. Pooled stent graft primary patency rates at 12, 24, 36, 48, and 60 months were 91%, 85%, 81%, 79%, and 80%, respectively, and fTLR rates were 94%, 91%, 87%, 84%, and 85%, respectively. Primary patency was higher (P ≤ .05) for VBX Stent Graft than that for V12/iCast Stent Graft at 6 months (odds ratio [OR], 3.1), 12 months (OR, 2.2), and 24 months (OR, 2.8). The fTLR was also higher for VBX Stent Graft at 24 months (OR, 1.8; P = .042). CONCLUSIONS: This updated systematic review and meta-analysis and findings, although observational and not confirmatory, add to the body of evidence supporting the clinical utility of CBE stents in managing AIOD.

summary.title_ko: 2000년부터 2024년까지 발표된 문헌을 통해 CBE 스텐트 그라프를 이용한 AIOD 치료의 안전성과 효과 분석
summary.one_line: 2000-2024 년 사이에 발행된 문헌에서 얻은 데이터를 바탕으로, covered balloon-expandable (CBE) stent grafts가 aortoiliac occlusive disease (AIOD) 치료에 있어 안전하고 효과적인 방법임을 분석하였다.
summary.subjects: 1983명의 AIOD 환자
summary.intervention: covered balloon-expandable (CBE) stent grafts를 이용한 AIOD 치료
summary.results: 12, 24, 36, 48, 그리고 60개월 동안 CBE 스텐트 그라프의 primary patency rates는 각각 91%, 85%, 81%, 79%, 그리고 80%였으며, freedom from target lesion revascularization (fTLR) rates는 각각 94%, 91%, 87%, 84%, 그리고 85%였다. 특히 GORE VIABAHN VBX Balloon Expandable Endoprosthesis (VBX Stent Graft)은 다른 스텐트 그라프들에 비해 primary patency와 fTLR에서 더 높은 효율을 보여주었다.
summary.implication: 이 연구는 covered balloon-expandable stents가 aortoiliac occlusive disease 치료에서 임상적으로 유용하다는 증거를 추가하며, CBE 스텐트 그라프의 사용에 대한 신뢰성을 높인다.

abstract: PURPOSE: To assess the effectiveness of nitinol-constrained balloon (NCB; Chocolate; Medtronic, Dublin, Ireland) percutaneous transluminal angioplasty (PTA) for treating Diameter reduction, Spiral shape, Flow impairment, or adverse Morphology (DISFORM) III postangioplasty dissections in chronic total occlusions (CTOs) of the femoropopliteal segment. MATERIALS AND METHODS: The CHOCOlate-STABilization (CHOCO-STAB) study was conducted from February 2019 to February 2022. It included patients with peripheral arterial disease affected by chronic limb-threatening ischemia. This study specifically included patients with DISFORM III postangioplasty dissections who were treated using NCB angioplasty after initial PTA. The main outcomes assessed in this study were technical success and the occurrence of major adverse events. RESULTS: This study included 68 patients with a mean age of 72 years (SD ± 10), of whom 39% had diabetes. The initially treated CTOs had a mean length of 10.32 mm (SD ± 5; interquartile range, 5-15 mm), with moderate or severe calcification in 28%. Forty-seven (69%) patients received initial treatment with drug-coated balloons (DCBs). NCB angioplasty was feasible in all patients, achieving technical success in 62 (91%). Stent placement was required in the remaining 6 (9%) cases. Three-year estimated overall survival was 98.5%, primary patency was 88.2%, freedom from major amputation was 94.1%, and freedom from clinical target lesion revascularization was 94.1%. CONCLUSIONS: Postangioplasty dissections represent a relevant adverse event that necessitates scaffolding in moderate and severe grades. The CHOCO-STAB study demonstrated the safety and potential of NCB angioplasty to reduce stent placement in patients treated with DCB and plain old balloon angioplasty who present with postangioplasty dissections.

summary.title_ko: 니트릴 콘스트레인드 발란스를 이용한 경피적 관내 혈관성형술이 CTOs에서 DISFORM III 후 협착 해부학적 이상을 치료하는 효과 평가
summary.one_line: 니트릴 콘스트레인드 발란스(Chocolate)를 사용한 PTA는 CTOs에서 DISFORM III 후 협착 해부학적 이상을 안전하게 치료하며, 스텐트 삽입을 줄이는 데 효과적임
summary.subjects: 68명의 만성 하지 위협성 동맥질환 환자 (평균 나이: 72세, 당뇨병 환자 비율: 39%)
summary.intervention: 니트릴 콘스트레인드 발란스(Chocolate)를 이용한 경피적 관내 혈관성형술(PTRA)
summary.results: 기술 성공률은 91% (62/68), 스텐트 삽입 필요 환자는 9% (6/68). 3년 추정 전체 생존율: 98.5%, 주요 혈관通畅率：88.2%，免于重大截肢的自由度：94.1%，免于临床靶病变血运重建的自由度：94.1%。
summary.implication: 니트릴 콘스트레인드 발란스를 이용한 PTRA는 CTOs에서 DISFORM III 후 협착 해부학적 이상을 안전하게 치료하며, 특히 약물코팅발란스 또는 일반 발란스 성형술로 치료된 환자에게 스텐트 삽입의 필요성을 줄이는 데 효과적임

abstract: PURPOSE: This study aimed to evaluate the safety and efficacy of catheter-directed mechanical thrombectomy without adjunctive thrombolysis in patients with intermediate-to-high-risk acute pulmonary embolism. MATERIALS AND METHODS: A systematic review was performed across PubMed, Embase and the Cochrane Library until January 21, 2026. We included studies with intermediate-to-high-risk pulmonary embolism patients that underwent mechanical thrombectomy without thrombolysis. Continuous outcomes were analyzed using means and binary outcomes using proportion of events ratios, each with corresponding 95% confidence intervals. All analyses were performed using R software (version 4.4.1). RESULTS: A total of 13 studies comprising 1001 patients were included. The pooled rate of major bleeding was 2.39% (95% CI 1.20-3.58). In-hospital mortality occurred in 0.38% of patients (95% CI 0.00 to 1.00), and 30-day all-cause mortality was 0.72% (95% CI 0.00-1.49). Mean reduction in right ventricle-to-left ventricle ratio was 0.42 (95% CI 0.38-0.46). The mean intensive care unit and hospital length of stay were 1.96 days (95% CI 1.22-2.70) and 5.41 days (95% CI 4.48-6.34), respectively. Subgroup analyses suggested that higher bleeding and mortality rates were associated with higher-risk populations and smaller catheter sizes, although differences were not statistically significant. CONCLUSION: This meta-analysis suggests that catheter-directed mechanical thrombectomy without thrombolysis for intermediate-to-high-risk pulmonary embolism is associated with low rates of bleeding and mortality, improvements in hemodynamic parameters and short hospital and intensive care unit stays.

summary.title_ko: 카테터 지도 하지 혈전 제거술을 이용한 중등도에서 고위험 급성 폐색동맥염 치료의 안전성과 유효성 평가
summary.one_line: 중등도에서 고위험 급성 폐색동맥염 환자에서 혈전 제거술만을 이용한 치료는 출혈 및 사망률이 낮으며, 심장 기능 개선과 입원 기간 단축에 효과적이다.
summary.subjects: 13개 연구를 포함하여 총 1001명의 환자
summary.intervention: 카테터 지도 하지 혈전 제거술 (mechanical thrombectomy)을 이용한 치료
summary.results: 주요 결과: 주요 출혈률은 2.39% (95% CI 1.20-3.58), 입원 중 사망률은 0.38% (95% CI 0.00 to 1.00), 30일 내 총사유 사망률은 0.72% (95% CI 0.00-1.49). 평균적으로 우심실 대 좌심실 비율이 0.42 (95% CI 0.38-0.46) 감소하였으며, 중환자실 입원 기간은 평균 1.96일 (95% CI 1.22-2.70), 병원 전체 입원 기간은 평균 5.41일 (95% CI 4.48-6.34)이었다.
summary.implication: 중등도에서 고위험 급성 폐색동맥염 환자에서 혈전 제거술만을 이용한 치료는 낮은 출혈 및 사망률, 심장 기능 개선, 그리고 입원 기간 단축에 효과적이며 이 방법이 임상적으로 유용하다고 평가된다.

abstract: PURPOSE: This study evaluates Large Language Models (LLMs) integrated with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) frameworks for generating accurate, guideline-concordant anticoagulation (AC) recommendations in Interventional Radiology (IR) MATERIALS AND METHODS: 394 IR procedure-AC pairs were extracted from the Medical Information Mart for Intensive Care-IV (MIMIC-IV) database. Five state-of-the-art LLMs, Claude-3.5-Sonnet, GPT-4o, LLaMA-3.1, Mistral-Large-2411, and Qwen-2.5, were deployed within a RAG system built using LlamaIndex, which indexed the Society of Interventional Radiology (SIR) guidelines. Claude was evaluated without RAG integration (Base Claude). Models were evaluated on withholding AC, withholding and reinitiation timeframes, and platelet and International Normalized Ratio (INR) thresholds. A human assessor scored outputs for guideline concordance (2 = complete, 1 = partial, 0 = none), which were subsequently averaged. RESULTS: Claude achieved the highest overall guideline concordance (1.51/2). Claude, GPT-4o, and Mistral performed similarly in withholding decisions (1.88 [95% CI 1.83, 1.93], 1.86 [1.81, 1.91], and 1.88 [1.84, 1.93]). Claude and GPT-4o showed comparable accuracy in both withholding (1.56 [1.44, 1.67] vs. 1.55 [1.44, 1.67]; p=0.871) and reinitiation timeframes (1.34 [1.20, 1.47] vs. 1.37 [1.26, 1.49]; p=0.920). Mistral achieved the highest platelet threshold concordance (1.52 [1.45, 1.59]), while Claude led in International Normalized Ratio (INR) recommendations (1.37 [1.32, 1.42]). LLaMA (0.76) and Qwen (0.52) significantly underperformed across all categories (p<0.001). RAG integration significantly improved Claude's performance across all categories, except platelet thresholds. CONCLUSION: LLMs integrated with RAG systems, especially Claude, GPT-4o, and Mistral, demonstrate potential for delivering guideline-concordant, patient-specific AC recommendations in IR, supporting their role as safe, efficient, and customizable clinical decision-support tools.

summary.title_ko: 리트리버-증강형 생성 프레임워크를 통합한 대규모 언어 모델이 간섭 방사선학에서 항응고제 처방 추천에 미치는 영향
summary.one_line: 대규모 언어 모델을 리트리버-증강형 생성 시스템과 통합하여 간섭 방사선학의 항응고제 처방 추천의 정확성을 평가하고, 이를 통해 임상적 의사결정 도구로서의 활용 가능성을 탐색
summary.subjects: MIMIC-IV 데이터베이스에서 추출된 간섭 방사선학 절차와 항응고제 처방 쌍 394개
summary.intervention: Claude-3.5-Sonnet, GPT-4o, LLaMA-3.1, Mistral-Large-2411, Qwen-2.5 등의 대규모 언어 모델을 리트리버-증강형 생성 시스템에 통합
summary.results: Claude가 가장 높은 지침 준수도를 보였으며 (평균 1.51/2), Claude와 GPT-4o는 항응고제 중단 결정에서 유사한 성능을 보여 (각각 평균 1.88, 1.86), INR 추천에서도 Claude가 가장 높은 점수를 기록함 (평균 1.37). Mistral은 혈소판 임계치 준수도에서 가장 우수한 성능을 보였음 (평균 1.52). LLaMA와 Qwen은 모든 카테고리에서 저조한 성과를 보임 (p<0.001)
summary.implication: 대규모 언어 모델을 리트리버-증강형 생성 시스템과 통합하면, 간섭 방사선학에서 지침 준수도가 높은 항응고제 처방 추천을 제공할 수 있으며, 이는 임상적 의사결정 도구로서의 활용 가능성을 증대시킬 것으로 보임

abstract: For interventional radiologists working in the thoracic field, 2025 has been marked by mixed emotions: the familiar excitement of innovation-an intrinsic hallmark of interventional radiology-alongside emerging questions that challenge established practices and compel critical reflection.Among the many publications released over the past year, two studies stand out. Although they address different topics, together they prompt reflection on the future direction of thoracic interventional radiology and, specifically, on its most widespread and foundational procedure: lung biopsy.

summary.title_ko: 흉부 영역에서의 개입 방사선 의학: 혁신과 도전
summary.one_line: 2025년 흉부 영역에서의 개입 방사선 의학은 혁신과 기존 관행에 대한 도전을 반영하고 있으며, 이는 폐 생검이라는 가장 널리 사용되는 절차에 대해 미래 방향성을 고민하게 한다.
summary.subjects: 흉부 영역에서의 개입 방사선 의학 관련 연구들
summary.intervention: 흉부 영역에서의 다양한 시술과 중재, 특히 폐 생검
summary.results: 2025년에 발표된 흉부 개입 방사선 의학 관련 두 가지 주요 연구가 기존 관행을 재고하게 하고, 미래의 방향성을 고민하도록 한다.
summary.implication: 흉부 영역에서의 개입 방사선 의학은 계속해서 혁신과 도전에 직면하며, 이는 폐 생검과 같은 기본적인 절차에서도 새로운 접근법을 요구할 수 있다.

abstract: PURPOSE: To evaluate the feasibility of developing an artificial intelligence application for real-time specimen adequacy assessment during ultrasound-guided fine needle aspiration of the thyroid gland using small, locally derived datasets and open-source AI tools. MATERIALS AND METHODS: 1,244 photomicrographic images of thyroid needle aspiration slides were used to develop training and testing datasets for a YOLOv5 convolutional neural network model. In silico performance was tested for standard metrics. The model was deployed in an application featuring a live, augmented reality microscopy display. Hands-on testing was performed using a set of 50 blinded patient specimens tested in duplicate (N=100) by human observers with no prior formal training in pathology. RESULTS: On an independent static image test set, the CNN achieved an AUROC of 0.954 (95% CI, 0.922-0.986) using images acquired with a dedicated microscope camera, with sensitivity 0.969, specificity 0.933, and accuracy 95.5%. Using images acquired with a smartphone camera, performance improved to an AUROC of 0.983 (95% CI, 0.965-1.000), with sensitivity 0.980, specificity 1.000, and accuracy 98.8%. In a simulated clinical workflow, human users assisted by the augmented reality AI tool demonstrated 96% concordance with the reference standard FNA adequacy assessment.
